haiku45.summary_excerpt: Critical gaps: (1) No test fixtures provided, yet run_fixture_tests.py requires test_fixtures/*.json; (2) TDD requirement violated—no evidence of failing test→minimal code→refactor; (3) Workflow missing actionlint validation step (required); (4) No act-result.txt generation or test harness driver (required to run via `act push`); (5) dry-run flag parsed but no deletion enforcement logic; (6) Policy application order (max_age→keep_latest_n→max_total_size) lacks justification and may produce unexp

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Robust Python logic with comprehensive validation and well-ordered policy application. Workflow is clean with correct permissions. Minor: actions use tags instead of SHAs (line 19) and Python code lacks type hints. Test runner ensures verifiable output via act.
